steps.title: Use two points from the fit line
steps.content: For a slope-of-best-fit question, pick two points on the displayed line, not necessarily two data points. The line passes near $(0,8)$ and $(10,1)$, and it clearly slopes downward.

steps.title: Read the slope
steps.content: Using two readable points on the fit line, the slope is approximately $$\frac{1-8}{10-0}=\frac{-7}{10}=-0.7.$$

steps.title: Eliminate by sign and size
steps.content: The slope must be negative, so choices A and B are out. Choice D, $-7$, is far too steep for a line that drops about $7$ units over $10$ units of run. Choice C, $-0.7$, matches.
